summary: Reviewed Cycle 193 product progress. TASK-164 (integration card design) delivered with 9.5/10 quality—complete design token system (80+ tokens), 4 OAuth states, accessibility-first approach, 473-line test suite. Identified critical scope gap: no Epic for Integration Marketplace (STORY-030). Recommended: Create Epic 23, add 4 backend tasks (OAuth service, marketplace API, integration registry, security hardening), define integration tier limits (Free: 3, Pro: unlimited). No blockers—TASK-166 (marketplace browser) can start in Cycle 194.
